name: 7 Colored Fish
text: A rare rainbow fish that has never been caught by mortal man.

name: Acrobat Monkey
text: An autonomous monkey type robot which was developed with cutting-edge technology. It moves very acrobatically.

name: Aitsu
text: He seems to be very unreliable, but he might have incredible potential.

name: Alexandrite Dragon
text: Many of the czars' lost jewels can be found in the scales of this priceless dragon. Its creator remains a mystery, along with how they acquired the imperial treasures. But whosoever finds this dragon has hit the jackpot... whether they know it or not.

name: Alien Shocktrooper
text: The Aliens have used a mysterious biological substance to create a supreme race of soldiers. They do not have the natural powers of the other Aliens, but can make stunning physical attacks.

name: Alinsection
text: A stag beetle with a saw-like head and arms.

name: Alligator's Sword
text: ey, dis mighty lissard man can swing his sword so fast, dat it's more dan da speed a sound!

name: Ally Mind
text: A high-performance unit developed to enhance the Artificial Intelligence program in Ally of Justice. Loaded with elements collected from a meteor from the Worm Nebula, it allows for high tuning performance, but its true capacity is not yet uncovered.

name: Ally of Justice Clausolas
text: A mighty monster in Mist Valley, and the ultimate weapon designed from Claiomh Solais. Its surprise attacks from above baffle invaders.

name: Alpha The Magnet Warrior
text: Alpha, Beta, and Gamma meld as one to form a powerful monster.

name: Amazon of the Seas
text: A mermaid who serves as a herald to the Ocean Lord. She protects the sacred domain of Atlantis.

name: Amphibian Beast
text: On land or in the sea, the speed of this monster is unmatchable.

name: Ancient Brain
text: A fallen fairy that is powerful in the dark.

name: Ancient Elf
text: This elf is rumored to have lived for thousands of years. He leads an army of spirits against his enemies.

name: Ancient Lizard Warrior
text: Before the dawn of man, this lizard warrior ruled supreme.

name: Ancient One of the Deep Forest
text: This creature adopts the form of a white goat living in the forest, but is actually a Forest Elder.

name: Ancient Tool
text: A destructive machine discovered in the Ruins of the Ancients.

name: Angel Trumpeter
text: This beautiful, fairy-like flower generates a delusional mist to keep intruders away from the deepest parts of the forest, where sacred beasts dwell.

name: Anotherverse Dragon
text: This secretive dragon has conquered many dimensions, but can only be seen by the champion of time.

name: Anotherverse Gluttonia
text: A massive, malevolent monstrosity, devourer of diverse dimensions, who molds multiple domains where only the mightiest dare dwell.

name: Anotherverse Solaria
text: The stellar god of another world, harboring its twilight sun. His frozen flames leave a scorched trail across the dimensions, forever seeking new strength.

name: Anotherverse Stratios
text: This war god from the otherworld has trod countless battlefields beneath his armored feet. If you want his glory, come and get it!

name: Ansatsu
text: A silent and deadly warrior specializing in assassinations.

name: Anthrosaurus
text: Dis man-like dinosawz gotta high I.Q., even tho he's lackin' in da strength depawtment. (Kinda like yooz, if ya had a high I.Q.! Nyaah!)

name: Aqua Madoor
text: A wizard of the waters that conjures a liquid wall to crush any enemies that oppose him.

name: Archfiend Marmot of Nefariousness
text: An air marmot that has a nefarious horn and wings. It attacks by throwing acorns.

name: Archfiend Soldier
text: An expert at battle who belongs to a crack diabolical unit. He's famous because he always gets the job done.

name: Armaill
text: A strange warrior who manipulates three deadly blades with both hands and his tail.

name: Armored Lizard
text: A lizard with a very tough hide and a vicious bite.

name: Armored Starfish
text: A bluish starfish with a solid hide capable of fending off attacks.

name: Armored Zombie
text: This warrior blindly swings a deadly blade with devastating force.

name: Atlantean Pikeman
text: The Great Ocean Lord, who reigns over the depths, is served by these lancers. Deep-sea creatures exist in fear of facing the stream of attacks their lances are capable of.

name: Axe Raider
text: An axe-wielding monster of tremendous strength and agility.

name: Baby Dragon
text: Much more than just a child, this dragon is gifted with untapped power.

name: Baron of the Fiend Sword
text: An aristocrat who wields a sword possessed by a malicious spirit that preys on the weak.

name: Basic Insect
text: Usually found traveling in swarms, this creature's ideal environment is the forest.

name: Battle Footballer
text: A cyborg with high defense power. Originally it was invented for a football machine.

name: Battle Ox
text: A monster with tremendous power, it destroys enemies with a swing of its axe.

name: Battle Steer
text: A bull monster often found in the woods, it charges enemy monsters with a pair of deadly horns.

name: Battle Warrior
text: A warrior that fights with his bare hands!!!

name: Bean Soldier
text: A plant-warrior that attacks with seeds and sword.

name: Beast of Talwar
text: Only the master of the sword among Fiend-Type monsters is permitted to hold the Talwar.(This card is always treated as an "Archfiend" card.)

name: Beautiful Headhuntress
text: A vicious creature that has decapitated numerous enemy monsters.

name: Beaver Warrior
text: What this creature lacks in size it makes up for in defense when battling in the prairie.

name: Beckoned by the World Chalice
text: His battle with the Mekkstrosities never seems to end. Even when their forest was invaded by Mekkstrocious Insects, he stood his ground and inspired the other defenders around him.

name: Behegon
text: With an enormous maw and massive teeth, this monstrosity is one dangerous and strange serpent from the deep.

name: Beta The Magnet Warrior
text: Alpha, Beta, and Gamma meld as one to form a powerful monster.

name: Big Insect
text: A giant ant that dwells in the jungle, it is powerful whether attacking or defending.

name: Big Koala
text: A species of huge Des Koala. He's meek, but people are afraid of him because he's very powerful.

name: Bio-Mage
text: A mysterious priest created as a result of the latest advances in biotechnology.

name: Bitron
text: A new species found in electronic space. There's not much information on it.

name: Blackland Fire Dragon
text: A dragon that dwells in the depths of darkness, its vulnerability lies in its poor eyesight.

name: Blade Skater
text: An image of beauty on the ice, this gorgeous warrior rips her opponents into pieces with her stylish Accel Slicer attack.

name: Blazing Inpachi
text: A wicked wooden spirit now burning in flames. Its fire attack is powerful, but it will soon be nothing but ashes.

name: Blocker
text: Constructed from several components, this monster can launch them in a pincer attack.

name: Blue-Eyed Silver Zombie
text: The beams from the eyes of this creature are said to turn enemies into zombies.

name: Blue-Eyes White Dragon
text: This legendary dragon is a powerful engine of destruction. Virtually invincible, very few have faced this awesome creature and lived to tell the tale.

name: Blue-Winged Crown
text: With hair shaped like a crown and a body encased in bluish white flames, this bird is a formidable sight.

name: Bokoichi the Freightening Car
text: A freight car that is exclusively for Dekoichi. It can transport anything, but most cargo arrives broken.

name: Bolt Penguin
text: With each arm forming an electric whip, this monster paralyzes its enemies with electric shocks.

name: Boneheimer
text: This monster wanders the seas, sucking dry any creatures it may encounter.

name: Bottom Dweller
text: This is one sea creature whose wrath is something monsters fear to face.

name: Brave Scizzar
text: Armed with a mass of scissors, this monster can clip an enemy into any desired shape and size.

name: Bujin Hiruko
text: Imprisoned after a showdown with "Bujin Hirume" over the Sky Throne, this master schemer eventually escaped by manipulating Hirume and creating the sinister "Bujinki Amaterasu", then went on to almost engulf the world in darkness, but was finally defeated by Yamato and his allies.

name: Bunilla
text: This rabbit's got a sweet tooth! He's on a quest for the world's sweetest carrot, and just wants to nibble carrots all day today, tomorrow, and the day after that!

name: Burglar
text: A sly rat. He will come at you with his huge left claw.

name: Celtic Guardian
text: An elf who learned to wield a sword, he baffles enemies with lightning-swift attacks.

name: Chamberlain of the Six Samurai
text: The Six Samurai are supported from the shadows by this silent and mysterious warrior. His past is unknown to them, but his countless scars are proof of his experience.

name: Change Slime
text: A slime that can morph and adopt the shape and size of any monster it chooses.

name: Charcoal Inpachi
text: A wicked wooden spirit that has burned out. The barbecue grilled with this charcoal is so awesome that everybody thinks it's priceless.

name: Chosen by the World Chalice
text: Inspired by the World Hero legends he heard as a boy, this crusader adds a piece to his armor from every Mekkstrosity he destroys. He has set out on a quest from Fairy Lee to recover the Seven World Legacies and save their world.

name: Chu-Ske the Mouse Fighter
text: A fiery mouse, travelling the world to become the strongest fighter in the world of mice. Be careful not to touch him, or you will get burned.

name: Clavkiys, the Magikey Skyblaster
text: Everyone is full of possibilities. Everything you do, moving forwards, stopping, closing, opening, is all in your hands.There are many doors in this world. To open them requires the Magic Key... 2 keys and 1 door... 2 wills and 1 body. Once the doors are opened, the worlds will be connected and the great power revealed.

name: Claw Reacher
text: Stretching arms and razor-sharp claws make this monster a formidable opponent.

name: Cloudian - Smoke Ball
text: Smoke Balls are newly born Cloudians. They fear being alone, and would rather swing and sway in the sky with their friends.

name: Clown Zombie
text: A clown revived by the powers of darkness. Its deadly dance has sent many monsters to their graves.

name: Corroding Shark
text: A zombie shark that can deliver its lethal curse with a spell.

name: Cosmo Queen
text: Queen of the galaxies and mistress of the stars.

name: Crawling Dragon
text: This weakened dragon can no longer fly, but is still a deadly force to be reckoned with.

name: Crawling Dragon #2
text: A powerful dragon with teeth that can grind almost anything to dust.

name: Crazy Fish
text: A flying fish that attacks with its pointed head.

name: Crowned by the World Chalice
text: With her magical staff, she can channel the living heart of her world to shield her people from the Mekk-Knights that have overrun it.

name: Curse of Dragon
text: A wicked dragon that taps into dark forces to execute a powerful attack.

name: Curtain of the Dark Ones
text: A curtain that a spellcaster made, it is said to raise a dark power.

name: Cyber Falcon
text: A jet-powered hawk that travels at the speed of sound.(This card is not treated as a "Cyber" card.)

name: Cyber Soldier of Darkworld
text: A mechanical soldier that won't stop attacking until all life readings have been extinguished from its sensors.(This card is not treated as a "Cyber" card.)

name: Cyber-Tech Alligator
text: Originally a pterodactyl, he was viciously attacked by a dragon. Using the newest technologies, his keeper saved him from near-fatal wounds and brought him back as a powerful Cyborg.(This card is not treated as a "Cyber" card.)

name: Cycroid
text: The most lovable and friendly of all the Vehicroids. It can arm itself with training wheels!

name: D. Human
text: Gifted with the power of dragons, this warrior wields a sword created from a dragon's fang.

name: D.D. Trainer
text: A poor goblin that was sucked into a different dimension. However, he's doing his best with his new destiny.

name: Dancing Elf
text: An elf that dances across the sky with wings of razor-sharp blades.

name: Dark Assailant
text: Armed with the Psycho Sword, this sinister assassin rules the bad land.

name: Dark Bat
text: Bats from the netherworld that use their hyper senses to detect their enemies.

name: Dark Blade
text: They say he is a dragon-manipulating warrior from the dark world. His attack is tremendous, using his great swords with vicious power.

name: Dark Gray
text: Entirely gray, this beast has rarely been seen by mortal eyes.

name: Dark King of the Abyss
text: It's said that this King of the Netherworld once had the power to rule over the dark.

name: Dark Magician
text: The ultimate wizard in terms of attack and defense.

name: Dark Prisoner
text: This monster bends light to hide its image from the eyes of opponents.

name: Dark Rabbit
text: He leaps up, down, and all around! Nobody can lay a hand on this funny bunny.

name: Dark Titan of Terror
text: A fiend said to dwell in the world of dreams, it attacks enemies in their sleep.

name: Dark Witch
text: A popular creature in mythology that delivers fatal attacks with a sharp spear.

name: Darkfire Soldier #1
text: An explosive expert from a special elite force.

name: Darkfire Soldier #2
text: A warrior who gained immeasurable power from the heart of a volcano.

name: Darkworld Thorns
text: A thorny plant found in the darklands that wraps itself around any unwary traveler.

name: Destroyer Golem
text: A golem with a massive right hand for crushing its victims.

name: Dharma Cannon
text: A monstrous creature whose body is lined with cannons that never miss their targets.

name: Dig Beak
text: This beast coils like a snake, and strikes quickly with its snapping beak.

name: Digitron
text: A subspecies found in electronic space. There's little information on it.

name: Dipity
text: A cute little thing who lives in a glass bottle and is said to bring good luck to the one who makes a contract with it. The lid must never be opened, no matter what happens…

name: Disk Magician
text: This monster hides in a saucer and only appears when executing an attack.

name: Dissolverock
text: A monster born in the lava pits, it generates intense heat that can melt away its enemies.

name: Divine Dragon Ragnarok
text: A legendary dragon sent by the gods as their instrument. Legends say that if provoked, the whole world will sink beneath the sea.

name: Dokuroyaiba
text: A boomerang with brains that will pursue a target to the ends of the earth.

name: Doll Monster Bear-Bear
text: Even if we get damaged, it's okay.Grandpa Demetto can patch us up!

name: Doll Monster Miss Mädchen
text: Welcome to our house!Here I live with Cologne, Grandpa Demetto, and all the other dolls!

name: Doma The Angel of Silence
text: This fairy rules over the end of existence.

name: Dragon Core Hexer
text: Many years of dragonslaying have bathed this huntress in countless amounts of blood. Each drop gave her more power, but at a terrible price, as her cursed body now spreads the dragontaint like an epidemic. No village will take her in, and she no longer even remembers what inspired her crusade in the first place.

name: Dragon Horn Hunter
text: The horns were needed to prepare a medicine for her village, suffering from a plague. Unknown to her, the dragons burned and trampled her village, once displaced from their den.

name: Dragon Zombie
text: A dragon revived by sorcery. Its breath is highly corrosive.

name: Dragong
text: This gong harbors the soul of an untamed dragon. It soars through the skies with an incredible roar, marshaling all those who hear its call to battle.

name: Dragonpit Magician
text: This gifted magician can awaken the energy stored in the deep places of the earth, known as the Pits of the Dragon. His stoic approach wins him few friends, and he often bends to the desires of his pupil.

name: Dragonpulse Magician
text: This boy magician has the gift of seeing the natural lines of energy that run through the earth, which his people call the Pulse of the Dragon. His exuberance and skill put him in high regard with his mentor, the "Dragonpit Magician".

name: Dragoons of Draconia
text: Armed with muskets and iron spears, these mounted land troops of the Draconia Empire are feared by the Reptier Kingdom and other bordering nations.

name: Droll Bird
text: This monster stuns its enemies with a massive beak and ear-piercing wails.

name: Drooling Lizard
text: A blood-sucking snake in human form that attacks any living being that passes nearby.

name: Dunames Dark Witch
text: Even when all odds are against this brave fairy, she will press onwards in battle and never retreat.

name: Dungeon Worm
text: Hidden under the floors of a labyrinth, it swallows any who pass above.

name: Earthbound Spirit
text: A vengeful creature formed by the spirits of fallen warriors, it drags any who dare approach it into the deepest bowels of the earth.

name: Elemental HERO Avian
text: A winged Elemental HERO who wheels through the sky and manipulates the wind. His signature move, Featherbreak, gives villainy a blow from sky-high.

name: Elemental HERO Burstinatrix
text: A flame manipulator who was the first Elemental HERO woman. Her Burstfire burns away villainy.

name: Elemental HERO Clayman
text: An Elemental HERO with a clay body built-to-last. He'll preserve his Elemental HERO colleagues at any cost.

name: Elemental HERO Neos
text: A new Elemental HERO has arrived from Neo-Space! When he initiates a Contact Fusion with a Neo-Spacian his unknown powers are unleashed.

name: Elemental HERO Sparkman
text: An Elemental HERO and a warrior of light who proficiently wields many kinds of armaments. His Static Shockwave cuts off the path of villainy.

name: Empress Mantis
text: Queen of an army of giant mantises whose command moves legions.

name: Enchanting Mermaid
text: A beautiful mermaid that lures voyagers to a watery grave.

name: Evilswarm Heliotrope
text: .ytilaer a maerd rieht ekam thgim yeht taht os ydob a rof gninraey ,sluos mrawsleetS gniregnil fo sthguoht eht era esehT "!etanimretxE !etacidarE !etanimilE"

name: Fairy Dragon
text: This beautiful Dragon spirit harbors hidden strength.

name: Fairy's Gift
text: This flying monster is known for delivering happiness to all.

name: Faith Bird
text: This long-tailed bird blinds its enemies with mystical light.

name: Feral Imp
text: A playful little fiend that lurks in the dark, waiting to attack an unwary enemy.

name: Fiend Kraken
text: A giant squid that drags its enemies to a watery grave.

name: Fiend Reflection #2
text: A bird-beast that summons reinforcements with a hand mirror.

name: Fiend Scorpion
text: A huge scorpion inhabited by the soul of a fiend. Usually it holds back, but has untapped potential.

name: Fire Kraken
text: A squid that thrives on fire and heat.

name: Fire Opal Head
text: This dinosaur pack leader with a burning head of stone is named after his finishing move.

name: Fire Reaper
text: A reaper with a flaming arrow that burns an enemy to a crisp.

name: Firegrass
text: A fire-breathing plant found growing near volcanoes.

name: Firewing Pegasus
text: A heavenly stallion soaring through the skies on crimson wings.

name: Fireyarou
text: A malevolent creature wrapped in flames that attacks enemies with intense fire.

name: Flame Cerebrus
text: Known to many as the "Burning Executioner", this monster is capable of burning enemies to cinders.

name: Flame Champion
text: A warrior protected by a flaming shield that nullifies any attack.

name: Flame Dancer
text: This monster moves while swinging its burning rope.

name: Flame Manipulator
text: This Spellcaster attacks enemies with fire-related spells such as "Sea of Flames" and "Wall of Fire".

name: Flame Viper
text: A fire-breathing snake whose speed makes it a difficult target.

name: Flamvell Guard
text: A Flamvell guardian who commands fire with his will. His magma-hot barrier protects his troops from intruders.

name: Flash Knight
text: The power of the pendulum flashes forth from this shining knight.

name: Flying Fish
text: Three wishes are granted to those fortunate enough to see this monster in flight.

name: Flying Kamakiri #2
text: A flying mantis that feeds primarily on insects.

name: Flying Penguin
text: A very rare penguin that takes to the air with ears shaped like wings.

name: Foucault's Cannon
text: A mechanized life form, roving through space-time. But the mysterious thing is that its memory i... m...stly gone. W...at is t...e reason? D..... refuse t... b.... interfered w...h?

name: Frenzied Panda
text: A savage beast that carries a big bamboo stick for beating down its enemies.

name: Frostosaurus
text: This monster's metabolism enables it to endure long periods of cold, harnessing the power to become a creature of solid ice! Nothing else can withstand such temperatures, especially victims of its glacial rampage.

name: Gadget Soldier
text: A rust-free machine warrior born to battle.

name: Gagagigo
text: This young evildoer used to have an evil heart, but by meeting a special person, he discovered justice.

name: Gaia The Fierce Knight
text: A knight whose horse travels faster than the wind. His battle-charge is a force to be reckoned with.

name: Galaxy Serpent
text: Your hopes and dreams will be refreshed if you catch a glimpse of this rare creature in the evening twilight, soaring in the Sea of Stars.

name: Gallugallud the Endless Enigma
text: This sinister spirit of wavering flames can transform into any being. As it shifts from bird to human, and human to bird, it has forgotten its true self.

name: Gamma The Magnet Warrior
text: Alpha, Beta, and Gamma meld as one to form a powerful monster.

name: Garnecia Elefantis
text: A monster so heavy that each step rocks the earth.

name: Garoozis
text: An axe-swinging beast-warrior with the head of a dragon.

name: Gatekeeper
text: An indestructible mechanoid created for the sole purpose of guarding the gateways.

name: Gazelle the King of Mythical Beasts
text: This monster moves so fast that it looks like an illusion to mortal eyes.(This card is always treated as a "Phantom Beast" card.)

name: Gem-Knight Crystal
text: A Gem-Knight officer of high rank, who has optimized the use of the crystal powers. Despite his ability to overwhelm most opponents, he's wary of stretching himself too thin, and opts for solidarity with his comrades.

name: Gem-Knight Garnet
text: The Gem-Knight Warrior who carries the Garnet Soul. His Flaming Iron Fist crushes all enemies.

name: Gem-Knight Lapis
text: The best of friends with Lazuli, this soldier deeply cares about the well-being of her friends.

name: Gem-Knight Sapphire
text: His Sapphire power commands the waters to protect him from attack. His comrades trust in his silent protection.

name: Gem-Knight Tourmaline
text: He channels mystic energies and changes them into fighting strength through the power of Tourmaline. Many admire his way of life.

name: Gemini Elf
text: Elf twins that alternate their attacks.

name: Gene-Warped Warwolf
text: This warwolf was given incalculable strength through horrific genetic manipulation. Its gentle nature was completely wiped out, and it now lives only to unleash destruction.

name: Genex Controller
text: As a master of all powers and elements, this is one of the few Genex monsters that can communicate with its companions.

name: Ghost Beef
text: The Ghost of Christmas Dinner.

name: Giant Flea
text: A massive flea that feeds on the blood of its enemies.

name: Giant Mech-Soldier
text: This monster swings an earth-shaking axe that cannot be blocked by a common sword.

name: Giant Red Seasnake
text: A sea-dwelling snake that attacks passing enemies with its sharp teeth.

name: Giant Soldier of Stone
text: A giant warrior made of stone. A punch from this creature has earth-shaking results.

name: Giant Turtle Who Feeds on Flames
text: A crimson-shelled tortoise that feeds on flames.

name: Giga Gagagigo
text: In order to fight tremendous evil, he gained formidable power through body reconstruction, but lost his heart and his redemption.

name: Giga-Tech Wolf
text: An iron wolf with razor-sharp fangs that can penetrate any armor.

name: Giganto
text: A massive steel ball that mows down anything in its path.

name: Gigobyte
text: He has a tranquil soul, but carries a destiny that one day his heart shall be tainted by evil....

name: Gil Garth
text: This steel-armored terror machine ruthlessly strikes down enemies with its giant katana.

name: Girochin Kuwagata
text: Despite its small size, this monster has powerful jaws that can rip metal to shreds.

name: Gladiator Beast Andal
text: This one-eyed warrior bear is an aggressive hunter that strikes down its prey with the powerful swipes of its claws. No one can bear the brunt of his tremendously fast and heavy blows.

name: Goblin Calligrapher
text: A Goblin who devotes himself to mastering perfect calligraphy of the word "False". He gives his all to each stroke.

name: Gogiga Gagagigo
text: His soul long-since collapsed, his body recklessly continues onward, driven by a lust for more power. He no longer resembles his former self....

name: Gokibore
text: A large, spherical roach that attacks its enemies by rolling over them.

name: Golgoil
text: An iron giant that appears from a dimensional rift.

name: Gradius
text: A high-performance jet fighter with power capsules for variable attack capabilities.

name: Grand Tiki Elder
text: A masked monster that wields the most deadly of curses.

name: Grappler
text: A devious snake with a thick body that wraps around an enemy monster and squeezes the life out of it.

name: Great Angus
text: A very violent beast, it is always berserk. People say that they have never seen it silent.

name: Great Bill
text: Nothing escapes from this beast's massive mouth.

name: Great White
text: A giant white shark with razor-sharp teeth.

name: Green Phantom King
text: This youthful king of the forests lives in a green world, abundant with trees and wildlife.

name: Griffore
text: This monster's tough hide deflects almost any attack.

name: Ground Attacker Bugroth
text: A surface battle robot that was once used for sea warfare.

name: Gruesome Goo
text: A slime boss that is definitely tougher than it looks.

name: Guardian of the Labyrinth
text: A monster that guards the entrance to the Netherworld.

name: Guardian of the Throne Room
text: A robot guard built to protect throne rooms, it is armed with homing missiles.

name: Guardragon Justicia
text: The fate of the World depends on the Guardragons, born from the World Legacy.

name: Gunkan Suship Shari
text: Finally got to visit that harbor specializing in Gunkan Suships that I've been curious about for a while! The premium "Shari" here is limited to 2000 Suships a year, and uses specially developed smooth aged rice, giving it extra boldness not found anywhere else. The classy atmosphere made my heart sing, too. The Gunkan Suship served had a perfect balance of vinegar, nigiri, shine, and shape, demonstrating exquisite artisanship. The owner told me, "We are introducing rich yet mellow scented EDO-FRONT red vinegar in the near future," which I'm really looking forward to. However, I was disappointed the surrounding seas were a little noisy... so, giving it 4 stars with hope for improvements in the future.

name: Gyakutenno Megami
text: This fairy uses her mystical power to protect the weak and provide spiritual support.

name: Hallohallo
text: Hallo Hallo, brain of tallow,Guts are gone, noggin's hollow.Seeking sweets and marshing mallows,Watch your back, and your candy sack.

name: Haniwa
text: An earthen figure that protects the tomb of an ancient ruler.

name: Happy Lover
text: Enemies become overjoyed when struck by the Heart Ray emitted from the forehead of this tiny cherub.

name: Hard Armor
text: A living suit of armor that attacks enemies with a bone-jarring tackle.

name: Harpie Girl
text: A Harpie chick who aspires to flit about beautifully and gorgeously, but attack sharply.

name: Harpie Lady
text: This human-shaped animal with wings is beautiful to watch but deadly in battle.

name: Headless Knight
text: A haunted spirit of a falsely accused knight who wanders in search of truth and justice.

name: Hercules Beetle
text: A massive beetle with a tough carapace and a dangerous horn.

name: Hero of the East
text: Feel da strength ah dis sword-swingin' samurai from da Far East.

name: Hibikime
text: Confuses enemy monsters with a noise that is harsh to the ears.

name: Hieratic Seal of the Sun Dragon Overlord
text: A mysterious engraved Hieratic relic. It was thought to be a simple stone, but it was actually infused with the power of a sun-wielding dragon. Aeons passed, and the power of the relic grew and grew until it finally shone like the sun itself.

name: High Tide Gyojin
text: A very agile half-fish warrior known for its relentless attacks.

name: Hinotama Soul
text: An intensely hot flame creature that rams anything standing in its way.

name: Hitotsu-Me Giant
text: A one-eyed behemoth with thick, powerful arms made for delivering punishing blows.

name: Hourglass of Life
text: This creature grants power instead of shortening life.

name: Humanoid Slime
text: This slime apparently has some human genes in its genetic makeup.

name: Hunter Dragon
text: This dragon has taken down countless prey with its sharp fangs. It strikes very quickly, because if it does not strike first it is vulnerable to a counter-attack.

name: Hunter Spider
text: This monster feeds on whatever it catches in its web.

name: Hyosube
text: This amphibian is strong on the attack, but leaves much to be desired when defending.

name: Hyozanryu
text: A dragon created from a massive diamond that sparkles with blinding light.

name: Igknight Cavalier
text: The vaunted weapons of this pink Igknight have inflicted as much damage to her enemies as to her own troops, but she gets results so very few complain.

name: Igknight Crusader
text: This impulsive Igknight warrior is fanatical about the causes he fights for. Because of this passion, his comrades try to keep him at arm's length.

name: Igknight Gallant
text: A leader of the most dashing Igknight commando unit. His greatest challenge is keeping the hot tempers of his men under control.

name: Igknight Margrave
text: A high-ranking Igknight warrior. When he does enter the fray, his sweeping attacks are feared not just by the enemy but also his own troops.

name: Igknight Paladin
text: This Igknight has a reputation as a thinker with a cool head. But the truth is that his emotions just take longer to heat up.

name: Igknight Squire
text: The cold steel armor of this young squire cannot hide the keen, burning mind contained within.

name: Igknight Templar
text: An experienced Igknight warrior who fights for justice and despises the corrupt. He even questions his own weapon these days, due to his absolute quest for righteousness.

name: Igknight Veteran
text: This grizzled leader of the bodyguards division acts as chaperone to the Cavalier, and is one of the few complainers about her recklessness (mostly to the Gallant, the only one who understands him).

name: Illusionist Faceless Mage
text: Manipulates enemy attacks with the power of illusion.

name: Inpachi
text: A log that attacks lost travelers in the forest. Originally a big tree, it was cut down and possessed by a wicked spirit.

name: Insect Knight
text: Of all Insect fighters, he is the paragon of the Indestructible Insect Invaders, which only the elite of the elite can join. We can no longer ignore their unmatched battle prowess.

name: Invader from Another Dimension
text: An extraterrestrial monster that came from a distant galaxy.

name: Island Turtle
text: A huge turtle that is often mistaken for an island.

name: Jack's Knight
text: A strong master swordsman. His loyalty is to justice, his duty to protect the weak.

name: Jellyfish
text: An almost invisible, semi-transparent jellyfish that drifts in the sea.

name: Jerry Beans Man
text: Jerry, a bean soldier, believes he is the strongest warrior in the world, but his true abilities are still untested.

name: Jongleur-Ghoul Illusionist
text: A captivating street performer, who'll catch you off guard with his song and dance and hocus pocus attacks. Once his eyes start spinning, danger is impending, so make a run for it!

name: Judge Man
text: This club-wielding warrior battles to the end and will never surrender.

name: Kabazauls
text: A huge monster in the shape of a hippopotamus. The sneezing from his gigantic body is so fierce that people mistake it for a hurricane.

name: Kagemusha of the Blue Flame
text: Serving as a double for the Ruler of the Blue Flame, he's a master swordsman that wields a fine blade.

name: Kageningen
text: He yoozes both a physical and a shadow form ta attack. So he's a tough monstah ta beat!

name: Kairyu-Shin
text: A sea dragon known as the King of the Ocean, it attacks its enemies with huge tidal waves.

name: Kanan the Swordmistress
text: A lady warrior armed with sword and shield, she floats lightly and stings sharply.

name: Key Mace
text: Enemies' hearts will melt at the sight of this small fairy's cuteness.

name: Key Mace #2
text: This fiend brings out the worst in everyone.

name: Killer Needle
text: A huge bee with exceptional strength that's particularly dangerous in a swarm.

name: King Fog
text: A fiend that dwells in a blinding curtain of smoke.

name: King of Yamimakai
text: Wields the power of darkness to destroy its enemies.

name: Kojikocy
text: A man-hunter with powerful arms that can crush boulders.

name: Koumori Dragon
text: A vicious, fire-breathing dragon whose wicked flame corrupts the souls of its victims.

name: Kozaky
text: A workaholic fiend who devotes everything to his research into the languages of Dark World. His mind has collapsed because of working too hard.

name: Kumootoko
text: A massive, intelligent spider that traps enemies with webbing.

name: Kurama
text: A vicious bird that attacks from the skies with its whip-like tail.

name: Kuwagata α
text: A very vicious stag beetle that goes for the head.

name: La Jinn the Mystical Genie of the Lamp
text: A genie of the lamp that is at the beck and call of its master.

name: Labradorite Dragon
text: The ancients compared this prized creature to moonlight rippling across water. A bringer of harmony, reminder of past glories, able to soothe the hearts of even the most ambitious men.

name: Labyrinth Wall
text: These walls form a labyrinth with no exit for enemies.

name: Lady of Faith
text: Soothes the souls of others by chanting a mysterious spell.

name: Lancephorhynchus
text: This primordial species survived extinction by evolving an offensive lance that can pierce anything, although its diet still consists mainly of fish.

name: Larvas
text: A fast-moving, bird-like creature that strangles opposing monsters with its long, thin arms.

name: Launcher Spider
text: A mechanical spider with rocket launchers capable of random fire.

name: Left Arm of the Forbidden One
text: A forbidden left arm sealed by magic. Whosoever breaks this seal will know infinite power.

name: Left Leg of the Forbidden One
text: A forbidden left leg sealed by magic. Whosoever breaks this seal will know infinite power.

name: Leogun
text: Huge monster with a lion's mane similar to the King of Beasts.

name: Leonardo's Silver Skyship
text: Her wings display her glory.The proof of her glories are told in legend..

name: Leotron
text: A territorial electronic monster that guards its own domain.

name: Lesser Dragon
text: A minor dragon incapable of breathing fire.

name: Lightning Conger
text: This massive eel generates huge charges of electricity and unleashes them as thunderbolts.

name: Liquid Beast
text: A liquid life form that thrives on water.

name: Little D
text: Yo, this tyrannosaurus tot's got a terrible temper.

name: Lizard Soldier
text: A beast soldier derived from dragons, it is small for a Dragon-Type. Moving very quickly, this monster is an excellent strategist.

name: Lord of the Lamp
text: This spirit emerges from the mystic lamp and obeys the wishes of its summoner.

name: Lunar Rabbit Omajinai
text: A mysterious visitor who has descended from the heavens. It converts pain into signals and sends them into space, but its purpose is still unknown.Pain, pain, go away.

name: Luster Dragon
text: A very beautiful dragon covered with sapphire. It does not like fights, but has incredibly high attack power.

name: Luster Dragon #2
text: This dragon feeds on emerald. Enchanted by this monster even when attacked, few people live to tell of its beauty.

name: M-Warrior #1
text: Specializing in combination attacks, this warrior uses magnetism to block an enemy's escape.

name: M-Warrior #2
text: Specializing in combination attacks, this warrior is equipped with a tough, magnetically coated armor.

name: Mad Dog of Darkness
text: He used to be a normal dog who played around in a park, but was corrupted by the powers of darkness.

name: Mad Lobster
text: A gourmet food renowned by the Dark World upper crust. It has sensational flavor.

name: Magical Ghost
text: This creature casts a spell of terror and confusion just before attacking its enemies.

name: Magicalibra
text: A sentient scale. It maintains the balance of the universe, but often places the stars on the wrong side.

name: Maiden of the Moonlight
text: A sorcerer blessed by lunar light with powers far beyond mortal comprehension.

name: Mammoth Graveyard
text: A mammoth that protects the graves of its pack and is absolutely merciless when facing grave-robbers.

name: Man Eater
text: Man-eating plant with poison feelers for attacking enemies.

name: Man-Eating Treasure Chest
text: A monster disguised as a treasure chest that is known to attack the unwary adventurer.

name: Mandragon
text: This mandragora harbors the soul of a sorrowful dragon. The cursed tones of its wailing cause both fear and despair.

name: Masaki the Legendary Swordsman
text: Legendary swordmaster Masaki is a veteran of over 100 battles.

name: Master & Expert
text: A deadly duo consisting of a beast master and its loyal servant.

name: Master Kyonshee
text: A wandering Kyonshee searching for a strong rival to defeat. They say he was known as the master of all martial arts.

name: Master Pendulum, the Dracoslayer
text: "Luster Pendulum, the Dracoslayer" continues his journey to uncover the secrets of Dragon Alchemy, believing it is the key to dispelling his curse and restoring his memory. His power continues to grow... perhaps the same power used by the Dracofiends?

name: Mechanical Snail
text: A cyborg snail that still travels at a slow pace.

name: Mechanicalchaser
text: A hunter that relentlessly pursues its target by order of the Machine King.

name: Meda Bat
text: An eyeball fiend created by a servant of the wicked, it uses "Dark Blasts" to blow away its enemies.

name: Mega Thunderball
text: Rolls along the ground releasing bolts of electricity to attack its enemies.
